input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.14.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.14.2.2
            TITLE: any imposed penalty will be at the discretion of the officials.

            CONTENT:
            rule D.14.2.2: Any imposed penalty will be at the discretion of the officials.
D.14.2.2 Any imposed penalty will be at the discretion of the officials.

final_answer: rule D.14.2.2: Any imposed penalty will be at the discretion of the officials.
